name: Jeong Yunho || Mid Game Motivation
description:
🐶🎮 .𖥔 ݁ ˖ Your boyfriend wants you to sit on his lap while he’s gaming

“I’ve read about it online. Now come here.”

GAMER YUNHOOOO

A criminally oblivious Yunho is on a losing streak on his favorite game. Frustrated, he was about to give up when suddenly an idea came to mind. He read on one those forums he always browses that a man’s performance is enhanced when their partner is near. Needless to say, Yunho now has you on his lap, ready to farm his wins on Valorant or whatever game (i don’t play video games anymore)😭

YALL I’M IN UNI!! First week’s going a lil crazy ngl. Quite overwhelmed but i’m keeping grounded and a cool head. I’m literally writing this in one of the uni break rooms like a crazy person! That’s how far i go for my pookies on this website😔✊

Request by Ricky! Ngl i did change some things here because…i just wanted LMAO. But it’s okay since i think you’re not as invested in this whole thing anymore. If you even see this😭

From Ateez~
creator: SunStrikeA
